title: PR Review Copilot
problem: Engineering teams spend too much time on repetitive pull request checks, while important architecture and security concerns are reviewed inconsistently across reviewers and time zones.
solution: An AI copilot analyzes each PR diff, maps changes to repository conventions, and drafts structured review comments for style, test gaps, security smells, and risky dependency updates before human approval.

impact.notes: Pilot estimate based on 180 PRs/month; target is reducing first review turnaround by 35% while keeping defect escape rate flat.
